ddls:
CREATE TABLE "verification_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification requirement */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location in the specification document */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Feature being verified */,
  "sub_feature" TEXT /* Sub-feature if any */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "verification_goal" TEXT /* Goals to achieve through verification */,
  "pass_fail_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria to determine pass or fail status */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "coverage_method" TEXT /* Method used for coverage measurement */,
  "link_to_coverage" TEXT /* Link to the coverage report */,
  "missing_coverage" TEXT /* Details on any coverage that is missing */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the requirement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the requirement */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the verification_requirements table */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test case */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test conducted */,
  "test_input" TEXT /* Input values for the test case */,
  "expected_output" TEXT /* Expected output values for the test case */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test case */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the test_cases table */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "pass_fail_status" TEXT /* Pass or fail status of the test case */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test result */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test result */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_analysis" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage analysis */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the verification_requirements table */,
  "coverage_method" TEXT /* Method used for coverage measurement */,
  "coverage_value" TEXT /* Coverage value for the verification requirement */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the coverage analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the coverage analysis was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the coverage analysis */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the coverage analysis was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "test_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_execution_history" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case execution */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the test_cases table */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the test case execution history */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case execution history was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the test case execution history */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case execution history was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the test_cases table */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the verification_requirements table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id")
)
